statement: In every magma, Equation 609 (`x = y * (z * (w * (u * y)))`) implies Equation 2563 (`x = (y * ((y * z) * w)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0738
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op u y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op y z) w)) y)
